headline: Amplifon GN Hearing Deal Reshapes Valuation And Growth Outlook
summary: Amplifon (BIT:AMP) has agreed to acquire GN Hearing, a hearing aid manufacturer, in a deal described by the company as the most transformative in its history. The transaction will combine Amplifon's global retail footprint with GN Hearing's manufacturing and technology capabilities. The acquisition is intended to create a vertically integrated audiology group with an expanded presence in key markets, including the US. Amplifon runs a global network of hearing care retail outlets, offering...

headline: 208 Ameriprise Financial Advisors Named to the Forbes "Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-in-State" List
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, March 18, 2026--Ameriprise Financial announced that 208 financial advisors were named to Forbes "Top Women Wealth Advisors Best-In-State" list.
